titleStmt.title: SII 24.146: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 146. (A.R. No. 18 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Registers gift of lands after purchase from the temple authorities by Ōlaimaṅgalam-uḍaiyāṉ Tiruveṇkāḍuḍaiyāṉ Śiṟiyāṇḍāṉ, a merchant of Kulōttuṅgachōḻapaṭṭaṇam in Śellūr-nāḍu in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu for offerings to god during the śandhi instituted in the temple in the name of the donor. The record is dated in the 32nd regnal year of the king. The agreement was engraved north of Śrīpāda which is to the east of Tiruvaṇukkaṉ Tirumāḷigai (central shrine) as stated in the inscription. The details of the date viz. 32nd year, Dhanus, śu. 1, Sunday and Mūla regularly correspond to A.D. 1209., November 29, Sunday, ·96, ·76.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉac cakkaravarttikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamuṅ karuvūrum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭaruḷi vijayābhiṣekamum virābhiṣekamum paṇṇiyaruḷiṉa tiripuvaṉa vīratevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 2 vatu taṉunāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu pratha
maiyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa mulattunāḷ pāṇṭi kulācaṉivaḷanāṭṭu viḷā nāṭṭu Aḻakiya maṇavāḷapperumāḷ koyil śrīceṉāpati Āḻvārkaṉmikaḷum mutaṟ karaṇattārum Irācarācavaḷanāṭṭuc cellūr nāṭṭu nakaraṅ kulottuṅka coḻa paṭṭaṇattu viyāpā
ri Olaimaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyāṉ ciṟiyāṇṭāṉukku nāṅkaḷ nilavilaip piramāṇa Icaivu tiṭṭukkuṭutta paricāvatu . tirunāmattuk kāṇiyāṉa nilattu Ivaṟkku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai tiruvaraṅkattu Aḷavu niṅkalāṉa tirukku
ṟaippaṟṟu śrīmaturāntakaṉ periya tirunantavaṉamum mottai colaiyum Uḷḷiṭṭa tirunantavaṉaṅkaḷ prasātañceytaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭi tirunantavaṉañ ceykai tavuntu dāsarkaḷukkum cālikaṟkkuk kuṭiyiruppukkāṇiyāka viṭṭa maṉamperiyāṉ tiruviti mel ciṟaku vāṉiḷavaṟutikku meṟkku te
npāṟkellai tennāṟṟu niroṭukālukku vaṭakkum mīpāṟkellai tirukkuṟai vaḷattāṉ Aṇaikkuk kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai paḻayateṉṉāṟu māṟiṉa Āṟṟu vaṭakaraikkut teṟkum Ākavicainta perunāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa nilattup paḻaiya teṉṉāṟāy Ōṭaiyum tiṭalumā
yp payiṟ ceyya Oṇṇātu kiṭakkiṟa nilamum taṇṭuṟai kāraikkuṭi nilattut teṉṉāṟṟu vaṭakaraippaṭṭa periyapirāṭṭiyār toppu Uḷpaṭṭa mānilaiyāṉa nilamum Uḷpaṭak kaikkoṇṭu ciṟukālai santi nittaṟppaṭi tirumañcaṉam paṇṇiyaruḷiṉāl paṭit tiruvārātaṉaṅkoṇ
ṭaruḷuvataṟku muṉpe Olaimaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyāṉ santiyeṉṟu Oru santi tiruvārātaṉaṅkoṇṭaruḷi tirumantira tiruppoṉakamāka Amutuceytaruḷa veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukkum mikuti tirupputiyitukkumuṭalākat tiruttivittut tiru nāmattukkāṇiyāka payir ce
yvippatāka Ivaṟkku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta mikutikkuṟai Uḷḷaṭaṅka Uttecap paṭi rūpāy 10 5- li Innilam patinaivveliyum viṟṟukkuṭuttukkoḷvatāṉa Emmili cainta vilaipporuḷaṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 10 5000 Ikkācu patiṉayyāyiramum Āvaṇak kaḷiye kāṭṭeṟṟi śrīpaṇṭārattu Oṭukkik ko
ṇṭu Innilam patinaiy veliyum Itil meṉokkiṉa maramuṅ kiḻ nokkiṉa kiṇaṟum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Urimaikaḷum Innilattukku nir pāSpace unengraved. y tirukkuṟai vaḷarttāṉaṇaiyil vaṭatalaiyil nirvāyppuppeṟa Oruvāyt talaivaittuk koḷḷa veṇṭum Urimaikaḷum Uṭpaṭa viṟṟukkuṭut
tom Ivvolaimaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyāṉ ciṟiyāṇṭāṉukku Ikkoyil śrīseṉāpatiyāḻvāṉ kaṉmikaḷum mutaṟkkaraṇattārum In nilattukku pramāṇa Icaivu tiṭṭiṉ paṭiye tiruvaṉukkan tirumāḷikaikkīḻ pakkattu śrīpātattukku vaṭakkākak kallu veṭṭivittuk kuṭu
kkakkaṭavomākavum . Ippaṭi sammatittu nilapramāṇa Icaivu tiṭṭukkuṭuttom Ivvolai maṅkalamuṭaiyān tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyāṉ ciṟiyāṇṭāṉukku Ikkoyil śrīsenāpatiyāḻvār kaṉmikaḷu mutaṟkaraṇattārum paṇiyāl Ivai koyilk kaṇakku putucceri Uṭaiyā
ṉ Uttamaṉ pallavaṉ viḻupparaiyar makaṉ Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷaṉāṉa Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap piriyaṉeṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu Eṉṟum maṟṟum veṇṭuvār Eḻuttumiṭṭatu . Ipramāṇappaṭi nilam patiṉaiyveliyum tirutti Iṉṉilattuṭal koṇṭu Ōlaimaṅkalamuṭaiyān tiruveṇkāṭuṭai
yāṉ santi Eṉṟu tiruvārātanaṅ koṇṭaruḷi Amutu ceytaruḷippotuka . Ipramāṇam śrīpaṇṭārattile OṭukkuRead ‘oṭukki’k koṇṭaruḷappeṟa veṇumeṉṟum Olaimaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyāṉ vaṇṭuvaraip perumāḷ viṇṇap pañceytaviṭattu Ippaṭiye ceyyappaṇṇuvateṉṟu Ippaṭikku mahā
niyoga meḻutikkalveṭṭikkuṭuppateṉṟu perumāḷ tiruviḷḷaRead ‘tiruvuḷḷa’māyaruḷi prasādañceytaruḷiṉapaṭiye Iṉṉilattuṭal koṇṭu tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyāṉ sandhi Eṉṟu candrādityavarai cellakkaṭavatāka mahāniyoga meḻuti paṇiyāl tirumaṅkaidāsar Eḻuttum tiruppati śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷ Eḻuttumiṭṭukkuṭuttatu . Itu śrīri
vaiṣṇavarkaḷ rakṣai .— Iṉṉilattuṭalil Iccantikku nimantañ cellum paṭikku kuṭutta niyokappaṭi tiruvaraṅka tevaṉāl tūṇippatakku ṉāṉāḻi Ariciyum neyyamutu kaṟiyamutu Uḷḷiṭṭa viñcanaṅkaḷum tiruppaḷḷittāmañ cantanakkāp puḷḷiṭṭa cāttuppaṭikaḷukkum veṇṭuvaṉakaḷukku Eṟṟamāna Uṭal tirupputiyitu
kkuṭalāy Amutu ceytaruḷi candrādityavarai cellakkaṭavatu .
Digital edition of SII 24.146 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
